name: tmdb
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for the TMDB MCP server in this workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Movie and TV discovery through the local TMDB MCP server
interface.longDescription: Use this workspace plugin to connect Codex to the TMDB MCP server in this repo for movie discovery, TV search, people lookup, recommendations, and watch-provider data.
defaultPrompt: What movies are trending this week?
Find sci-fi movies from 2023 rated above 7
Where can I watch Inception in India?
